e2ee/signs

      • verify(publicKey: PublicKey; message: string; signature: Signature): bool

This module implements Ed25519 signatures for signing and verifying messages. It provides high-level nim style APIs for generating signing key pairs, signing messages and verifying signatures.

Imports

private/monocypher, private/utils

Types

PublicKey = array[32, uint8]
SecretKey = array[64, uint8]
Seed32 = array[32, uint8]
Signature = array[64, uint8]
SigningKeyPair = object
  publicKey*: PublicKey ## The public key is 32 bytes, derived from the secret key.
                        ## It can be shared publicly and is used for verifying signatures
  secretKey*: SecretKey ## The secret key is actually 64 bytes, consisting of the 32-byte
                        ## seed followed by the 32-byte public key

Procs

proc generateSigningKeyPair(): SigningKeyPair {....raises: [OSError, ValueError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc generateSigningKeyPair(seed: Seed32): SigningKeyPair {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc publicKeyFromHex(s: string): PublicKey {....raises: [ValueError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Convert a hex string back to a PublicKey. The hex string must be 64 characters (32 bytes).

proc secretKeyFromHex(s: string): SecretKey {....raises: [ValueError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Convert a hex string back to a SecretKey. The hex string must

    forbids: [].}
Convert a hex string back to a Signature. The hex string must be 128 characters (64 bytes)
